creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Packages that install files into PYTHON_SITELIBDIR must use flavours and set PKGNAMEPREFIX as indicated in § 6.17 Porter's Handbook.  Please add this.

Please check if you can expand pkg-descr a bit.

python:3.5+ can be replaced by python as no version that old is in the Ports tree anymore.
